variants: Kiran Ashraf resides in Indigo Ledge Settlement and is recognized for his notable contributions to technology. Originally from Crimsonloam Borough, he is the author of the 'Bloom Circuit Schematic,' a key work in the design and engineering of circuits. As an active member of the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship, Kiran engages with fellow innovators and nature lovers alike. His dedication and achievements in the field were celebrated when he was awarded the Whispering Willow Medal, an honor that acknowledges his impact on the community.

With roots in Crimsonloam Borough, Kiran Ashraf currently calls Indigo Ledge Settlement home. His expertise in technological innovation is exemplified in his authored work, the 'Bloom Circuit Schematic.' Involved with the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship, Kiran enjoys collaboration with others who share his interests in exploration and invention. He earned the Whispering Willow Medal, recognizing his significant contributions and his commitment to advancing creative pursuits.
